page_content:
Prerequisite: JOUR670.

Jointly offered with: JOUR383.

Restriction: Permission of JOUR-Philip Merrill College of Journalism. Credit Only Granted for. JOUR668N or JOUR683 .

Formerly: JOUR668N.

JOUR689 News Coverage of Specialized Topics (1-3 Credits) Advance training and practice in writing and reporting news in on specialized field of interest.
